t_ch: 比如非日常的场景啦，熟悉的老演员啦，只要您愿意，我就能把它们拍成剧照喵。
t_en: Be it unusual scenes, familiar old actors, you name it, as long as you're up for it, I can turn anything into movie stills, meow!

t_ch: 是任何的妄想都可以吗？
t_en: Can it be any kind of delusion?

t_ch: 所有能够妄想出的场景和演员，必须经过严格的合规审查…妄想不是法外之地呢～
t_en: All delusional scenes and actors must go through a strict compliance review... Even delusions aren't above the law~

t_ch: 每台拍立得的「妄想剧场」都不一样，您在街头巷尾多找找，一定能拍到属于你的「人生照片」喵。
t_en: Each Instacam has its own Delusional Theater. So if you look around the streets and alleys, you'll definitely snap that life-defining photo of yours, meow!

t_ch: 已经听懂了。
t_en: Got it.

t_ch: 您不去想，我们就没法帮您实现。只要您敢想，我们总有办法…大概，喵。
t_en: If you don't picture it, we can never make it happen for you. But if you dare to dream it, we'll always find a way... probably, meow.

t_ch: 等不及了，开拍！
t_en: I can't wait any longer, action!

t_ch: 好喵，开始加载场景…开始加载演员喵。
t_en: Alright, loading scene... loading actors, meow.

t_ch: 3…2…1…这次进入的「妄想剧场」是——见面会。
t_en: 3...2...1... This time, the Delusional Theater takes us to... a meet-and-greet.

t_ch: 「咔嚓！」你两眼一黑，还没反应过来就被无形之力拽入了妄想空间。
t_en: "SNAP!" Before you could even react, you were yanked into the realm of delusions by an invisible force.

t_ch: 快选一个你心仪的组合试试喵。
t_en: Go ahead and pick a group that catches your eye!

t_ch: 知更鸟、星期日。
t_en: Robin, Sunday.

t_ch: 黑天鹅、黄泉。
t_en: Black Swan, Acheron.

t_ch: 真理医生、砂金。
t_en: Dr. Ratio, Aventurine.

t_ch: 一阵眩光过后，一组熟悉的身影出现在你面前……
t_en: After a flash of blinding light, a group of familiar figures appears before you...

t_ch: 黑猫拍立得，二相乐园最受欢迎的大头贴自助摄影机。除了「色彩艳丽」、「美颜过度」这些既有优点之外，还有着独一无二的「妄想」功能。
t_en: Black Cat Instacam is the most popular photo sticker booth in Planarcadia. Beyond its existing perks like vibrant colors and excessive beautification, it also features a unique "delusion" function.

t_ch: 很高兴为您服务喵。请您走近一些，将您那可爱的面庞对准镜头，让我带您进入「妄想剧场」喵。
t_en: At your service, meow! Please come closer and point that adorable face of yours at the camera. Allow me to guide you into the Delusional Theater, meow!

t_ch: 「妄想剧场」是什么？
t_en: What's this Delusional Theater?

t_ch: 妄想剧场，当然就是能满足您痴心妄想的地方喵。
t_en: The Delusional Theater is, of course, the place where all your wildest delusions come true, meow!

t_ch: 比如非日常的场景啦，熟悉的老演员啦，只要您愿意，我就能把它们拍成剧照喵。
t_en: Be it unusual scenes, familiar old actors, you name it, as long as you're up for it, I can turn anything into movie stills, meow!

t_en: Can it be any kind of delusion?

t_ch: 所有能够妄想出的场景和演员，必须经过严格的合规审查…妄想不是法外之地呢～

t_en: Each Instacam has its own Delusional Theater. So if you look around the streets and alleys, you'll definitely snap that life-defining photo of yours, meow!

t_ch: 已经听懂了。
t_en: Got it.

t_ch: 您不去想，我们就没法帮您实现。只要您敢想，我们总有办法…大概，喵。
t_en: If you don't picture it, we can never make it happen for you. But if you dare to dream it, we'll always find a way... probably, meow.

t_ch: 等不及了，开拍！
t_en: I can't wait any longer, action!

t_ch: 好喵，开始加载场景…开始加载演员喵。
t_en: Alright, loading scene... loading actors, meow.

t_ch: 3…2…1…这次进入的「妄想剧场」是——天台。
t_en: 3...2...1... This time, the Delusional Theater takes us to... a rooftop.

t_ch: 「咔嚓！」你两眼一黑，还没反应过来就被无形之力拽入了妄想空间。
t_en: "SNAP!" Before you could even react, you were yanked into the realm of delusions by an invisible force.

t_ch: 快选一个你心仪的组合试试喵。
t_en: Go ahead and pick a group that catches your eye!

t_ch: 刃、银狼。
t_en: Blade, Silver Wolf.

t_ch: 翡翠、托帕。
t_en: Jade, Topaz.

t_ch: 雪衣、寒鸦。
t_en: Xueyi, Hanya.

t_ch: 一阵眩光过后，一组熟悉的身影出现在你面前……
t_en: After a flash of blinding light, a group of familiar figures appears before you...

t_ch: 我连消毒水的气味都给您妄想出来了喵，氛围感是不是直接拉满？
t_en: I've even dreamed up the smell of disinfectant for you, meow. Really sets the mood, don't you think?

t_ch: 我还是要再次声明，这里发生的一切都是「妄想」，与现实世界无关哦。
t_en: I must reiterate that everything that happens here are just delusions and has nothing to do with the real world, got it?

t_ch: 至于剧场里的演员组合，全凭你自己选择喵。
t_en: As for the cast in the theater, it's all up to you to choose, meow.

t_ch: 医生，我还能活多久？
t_en: Doc, how much time do I have left?

t_ch: 5年？还是…5个月？
t_en: Five years? Or... five months?

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: Surprise！
t_en: Surprise!

t_ch: 我要掐死你！
t_en: I'm gonna kill you!

t_ch: 你这是来看望我吗？
t_en: Have you come to visit me?

t_ch: 怕你无聊，带了书给你。
t_en: I thought you might get bored, so I brought you something to read.

t_ch: 谢谢你，是什么书呢？
t_en: Thanks. What is it?

t_ch: 悬锋城字典。
t_en: The Castrum Kremnos Dictionary.

t_ch: 我一秒看完！
t_en: I'll be done with that in a second!

t_ch: …HKS。
t_en: ...HKS.

t_ch: 太卜大人，我还有救吗？
t_en: Master Diviner, is there any hope for me?

t_ch: 别担心，灵砂说你有救。
t_en: Calm down. Lingsha says you'll make it.

t_ch: 只怪我打牌到抽筋了。
t_en: I just got a cramp from shuffling tiles all day.

t_ch: 误会了，你还是没救了。
t_en: My mistake. In that case, you're doomed.

t_ch: 救救我吧，太卜大人。
t_en: Help me, Master Diviner!

t_ch: 我想太多又失眠了。
t_en: I've been overthinking, and it's keeping me up.

t_ch: 也许我可以帮你。
t_en: I might be able to help with that.

t_ch: 所以你在想什么呢？
t_en: And what is it you're overthinking about?

t_ch: 在想我为什么会失眠。
t_en: About why I'm still awake.

t_ch: 尾巴大爷，我死了。
t_en: Mr. Tail, I'm dead.

t_ch: 好吧好吧，你死了。
t_en: Fine, fine. You're dead. There.

t_ch: 能不能再关心一点？
t_en: Could you at least pretend to care?

t_ch: 我的天呐！
t_en: Oh my Aeon!

t_ch: 好平静！原来是死了！
t_en: Finally some peace and quiet! Because you're dead!

t_ch: …这哪里是关心了！
t_en: How is that supposed to be caring!?

t_ch: 布景——就位、灯光——就位、音响——就位。一切准备就绪！
t_en: Set... check. Lights... check. Sound... check. All systems are ready to go!

t_ch: 我还是要再次声明，这里发生的一切都是「妄想」，与现实世界无关哦。
t_en: I must reiterate that everything that happens here are just delusions and has nothing to do with the real world, got it?

t_ch: 至于剧场里的演员组合，全凭你自己选择喵。
t_en: As for the cast in the theater, it's all up to you to choose, meow.

t_ch: 亲爱的观众朋友们！
t_en: My dearest friends!

t_ch: 我想死你们啦——！
t_en: I missed you guys soooo much!

t_ch: 不对啊，我才是主角啊！
t_en: Hey, I'm the one in the spotlight here!

t_ch: 就是你把敌人引到这的？
t_en: Did YOU lead the enemy here?

t_ch: 什么敌人啊？这是观众！
t_en: What enemy? That's our audience!

t_ch: 小姐妹上台来说段相声。
t_en: Hey girl, get up on stage with me! Let's do crosstalk routine.

t_ch: 我可不会说相声捧哏啊。
t_en: But I don't know how to do a routine!

t_ch: 你只管说嗯嗯啊啊…是。
t_en: All you have to do is say, "Uh-huh, uh-huh... right."

t_ch: 嗯嗯啊啊…是。
t_en: Uh-huh, uh-huh... right.

t_ch: 给大家介绍下大傻子。
t_en: Allow me to introduce this fool!

t_ch: 嗯嗯啊啊…是。
t_en: Uh-huh, uh-huh... right.

t_ch: 去你的吧。
t_en: Oh, get outta here!

t_ch: 我会蒙上眼睛开三枪…
t_en: I'll shoot three times... blindfolded.

t_ch: 真是大胆的想法——
t_en: That's a bold move.

t_ch: 三枪全部爱死苹果。
t_en: And all three shots will kiss the apple.

t_ch: 无敌！那么苹果在哪？
t_en: Amazing! So, where's the apple?

t_ch: 等下放你的宝贝头上。
t_en: In a bit, I'll put it on your fudgehead.

t_ch: 在下告辞。
t_en: I'll excuse myself now.

t_ch: 我们来比赛赛跑吧！
t_en: How about a race?

t_ch: 在舞台上吗？
t_en: Here? On set?

t_ch: 竞速也是种娱乐节目嘛。
t_en: Racing is a perfectly valid form of entertainment, you know.

t_ch: 优胜者有什么奖品吗？
t_en: And what's the prize for the winner?

t_ch: 蜗居公主，摸摸身上。
t_en: Princess Homebody, you might want to pat yourself down.

t_ch: 把我的戒指还我！
t_en: Hey, give me my ring back!

t_ch: 餐厅里人头攒动，如此温馨日常的气氛下，你想凑出怎样的一桌呢？
t_en: The restaurant is bustling with people. In such a cozy, normal atmosphere, who would you want to gather around a table?

t_ch: 我还是要再次声明，这里发生的一切都是「妄想」，与现实世界无关哦。
t_en: I must reiterate that everything that happens here are just delusions and has nothing to do with the real world, got it?

t_ch: 至于剧场里的演员组合，全凭你自己选择喵。
t_en: As for the cast in the theater, it's all up to you to choose, meow.

t_ch: 你坐下，这次我买单。
t_en: Have a seat. This one's on me.

t_ch: 上次是你买的，别抢。
t_en: You paid last time, so it's my turn now.

t_ch: 糟糕，钱包忘带了！
t_en: Oh, shoot. I forgot my wallet!

t_ch: 哎呀巧了，我也是！
t_en: Well, fancy that! Me too!

t_ch: 你们又来这招是吧…
t_en: Are you two seriously pulling this again?

t_ch: 我们仨好久没在外吃饭了。
t_en: It's been a while since the three of us ate out.

t_ch: 这不是因为你炸了厨房吗？
t_en: And whose fault is that? You're the one who blew up the kitchen.

t_ch: 老弟，那只是科学实验。
t_en: That was just a scientific experiment, my dear brother.

t_ch: 姐，你自己做过饭吗？
t_en: Sis, have you ever actually cooked before?

t_ch: 厨房还在的时候…做过。
t_en: I did... back when we still had a kitchen.

t_ch: 算了，我们点餐吧。
t_en: Forget it. Let's just order something.

t_ch: 不想点菜，你们来点吧。
t_en: I don't feel like choosing. You guys decide.

t_ch: 大小姐，你来决定吧。
t_en: Lady Asta, it's your call.

t_ch: 啊…我也没吃过这家。
t_en: Ah... I've never eaten here before, either.

t_ch: 从上到下点一遍吧。
t_en: Then let's just order one of everything on the menu.

t_ch: 我们仨，这也太浪费了。
t_en: But there's only three of us. Most of it would go to waste.

t_ch: 哼，穷举法么，有意思。
t_en: Hmph. Trying every single possibility... An interesting approach.

t_ch: 庆祝椒丘出院吃火锅！
t_en: Let's have hot pot to celebrate Jiaoqiu getting out of the hospital!

t_ch: 灵砂医士说不能吃辣。
t_en: The healer Lingsha said no spicy food for him.

t_ch: 鸳鸯锅吧，一半微辣…
t_en: How about a yuanyang pot? We can have a mildly spicy stew in one half...

t_ch: 不，一半鸡汤一半菌汤。
t_en: Nah, let's go with half chicken and half mushroom broth.

t_ch: 太好了呢，椒丘！
t_en: That's wonderful, Jiaoqiu!

t_ch: 你们还是杀了我吧。
t_en: Just kill me already.

t_ch: 几位粉丝在安静排队。大明星正在与粉丝交流，签名、对话、合影…梦想照进现实喵。
t_en: Fans are quietly lining up, and the superstar is interacting with them, signing autographs, chatting, taking photos... Dreams are becoming reality, meow.

t_ch: 我还是要再次声明，这里发生的一切都是「妄想」，与现实世界无关哦。
t_en: I must reiterate that everything that happens here are just delusions and has nothing to do with the real world, got it?

t_ch: 至于剧场里的演员组合，全凭你自己选择喵。
t_en: As for the cast in the theater, it's all up to you to choose, meow.

t_ch: 我…我是你十年铁粉。
t_en: I... I've been your die-hard fan for ten years.

t_ch: 我…出道没有那么久。
t_en: I don't think... I have been in the business that long.

t_ch: 我有很多话想对你说。
t_en: I have so many things I want to tell you.

t_ch: 那你慢慢说，不着急。
t_en: Take your time, no rush.

t_ch: 我…你…我…你…我……
（只要微笑就好了吧？）
t_en: (Guess I just need to smile, right?)

t_ch: 哥…这位粉丝你来了？
t_en: Sun— is that you, my sunny fan?

t_ch: 啊…到底是被认出来了。
t_en: Ah... I got recognized after all.

t_ch: 你是来听我的演唱会的？
t_en: Are you here for my concert?

t_ch: …前三排买了九张连座。
t_en: ...I bought nine connected seats in the first three rows.

t_ch: 为、为什么？
t_en: Wh—Why?

t_ch: 不想被身旁的人认出来。
t_en: It's just that I don't want to be recognized by the surrounding audience.

t_ch: …这不是更加显眼了吗？
t_en: ...Wouldn't that make it even more conspicuous?

t_ch: 有意思，来抽张牌吧。
t_en: Interesting, wanna draw a card?

t_ch: 抽卡？好吧，这张吧。
t_en: Draw a card? Alright, this one.

t_ch: 这张牌面是…双人舞…
t_en: This card shows... a Pas De Deux...

t_ch: 该如何解读呢？
t_en: How should we interpret this?

t_ch: 命运的相遇，危机四伏。
t_en: A fateful encounter with danger lurking around.

t_ch: 所以，是不好的意思？
t_en: So, that's bad luck then?

t_ch: 这是段刻骨铭心的记忆。
t_en: This is a memory etched deep into my mind.

t_ch: 教授也对投资感兴趣？
t_en: Doctor, are you interested in investments too?

t_ch: 不感兴趣。
t_en: Not interested.

t_ch: 那就当是来给我捧场了。
t_en: Am I right I understand that you're here to support me, then?

t_ch: 随你怎么想。
t_en: Think whatever you want.

t_ch: 打个分吧。
t_en: Rate me, would you?

t_ch: 合格分。
t_en: Passable.

t_ch: 哇哦，我就当是表扬了。
t_en: Wow, I'll take that as a compliment.

t_ch: 微风拂过空旷天台，远处城市轮廓模糊。无数戏剧化的情景都曾在这里上演喵。
t_en: A gentle breeze sweeps across the empty rooftop as the city's silhouette blurs in the distance. So many dramatic scenes have played out here, meow.

t_ch: 我还是要再次声明，这里发生的一切都是「妄想」，与现实世界无关哦。
t_en: I must reiterate that everything that happens here are just delusions and has nothing to do with the real world, got it?

t_ch: 至于剧场里的演员组合，全凭你自己选择喵。
t_en: As for the cast in the theater, it's all up to you to choose, meow.

t_ch: 你快下来吧——
t_en: Please get down from there...

t_ch: 我保证不催你了。
t_en: I promise I won't rush you anymore.

t_ch: 你立字据！
t_en: Put it in writing!

t_ch: 我一心求死，你知道的。
t_en: Dying is the only thing I want. You know that.

t_ch: 我知道，而且你死不掉。
t_en: I'm aware, and you just cannot die.

t_ch: 你这样说话让我像搞笑角色。
t_en: The way you speak makes me sound like a comic relief character.

t_ch: 你少说两句就不像了。
t_en: Not if you didn't talk so much.

t_ch: 多事。
t_en: What a nuisance.

t_ch: 你看远方的那栋楼没有？
t_en: See that building over there?

t_ch: 我已经买下来了。
t_en: I've already bought it.

t_ch: 有兴趣做房产抵押了？
t_en: Interested in getting a mortgage?

t_ch: 它有点挡视线。
t_en: It's kind of blocking my view.

t_ch: 准备将它拆掉。
t_en: I'm gonna take it apart.

t_ch: …钱果然还是太多了。
t_en: ...Guess someone's got too much money to burn.

t_ch: （姐姐为什么会来天台？）
t_en: (Why would Xueyi come to the rooftop?)

t_ch: （难道是地下待太久了？）
t_en: (Has she been underground for too long?)

t_ch: （或者是真的有想不开？）
t_en: (Or maybe she's really feeling down?)

t_ch: （正在监视目标…）
t_en: (Monitoring target...)

t_ch: 离开妄想剧场
t_en: Leave the Delusional Theater

t_ch: 我过会再来。
t_en: I'll be back later.

t_ch: 好咧，妄想剧场随时等待您进入。
t_en: Alrighty then, the Delusional Theater awaits your entrance anytime!

t_ch: 与黑猫拍立得交互更换拍照组合
t_en: Interact with the Black Cat Instacam to switch photo combinations

t_ch: 可以在场景内随意拍摄喜欢的照片
t_en: Snap away and capture shots of whatever you like anywhere in the scene

t_ch: 试试更简单粗暴的方法吧，直接esc！
t_en: Try something simpler and brute. Just hit Esc!

t_ch: 整个事务所的空气中弥漫着若有若无的消毒水气味，似乎想要掩盖罪恶的气息。
t_en: A faint scent of disinfectant permeates the air in the office, as if trying to conceal an aura of sin.

t_ch: 我还是要再次声明，这里发生的一切都是「妄想」，与现实世界无关哦。
t_en: I must reiterate that everything that happens here are just delusions and has nothing to do with the real world, got it?

t_ch: 至于剧场里的演员组合，全凭你自己选择喵。
t_en: As for the cast in the theater, it's all up to you to choose, meow.

t_ch: 你跟我时间最短。
t_en: You've spent the least amount of time with me.

t_ch: 底子最干净。
t_en: You have a clean background.

t_ch: 路怎么走，你自己决定。
t_en: You can decide for yourself, which path do you want to take?

t_ch: 老大放心，我不会背叛。
t_en: Boss, don't worry. I won't betray you.

t_ch: 人心散了，队伍不好带了。
t_en: I've lost the will of the people. The team will be hard to lead.

t_ch: 以后你就是这里的老大了。
t_en: From now on, you'll be the boss here.

t_ch: 我明白了！全部交给我吧。
t_en: Got it! Leave it all to me.

t_ch: 我问你，帮派的目标是？
t_en: Let me ask you, what's the goal of the gang?

t_ch: 吃更多的汉堡！
t_en: To eat more burgers!

t_ch: 帮派对你来说还是太沉重了。
t_en: The gang is too much of a burden for you.

t_ch: 我有件事要交给你。
t_en: I have something to ask of you.

t_ch: 说吧，做什么？
t_en: Go ahead, what do you need me to do?

t_ch: 做下经营表格。
t_en: Execute a business report.

t_ch: 谁是…经营表格？
t_en: Who... is a business report?

t_ch: 你说话是有点吓人的。
t_en: The way you speak is a little scary.

t_ch: 快说！是谁欺负你们了？
t_en: Tell me! Who bullied all of you?

t_ch: …我没有被欺负。
t_en: ...I wasn't bullied.

t_ch: 克拉拉，你不要怕！
t_en: Clara, don't be scared!

t_ch: 鼹鼠党的怒火无人可挡！
t_en: The fury of The Moles is unstoppable!

t_ch: 娜塔莎姐姐找你。
t_en: Big Sis Natasha is looking for you.

t_ch: 咳咳…咳咳咳……
t_en: *cough* *cough* *cough*...

t_ch: 这件事就当我没听过吧。
t_en: I'll pretend I didn't hear that.

t_ch: 宽敞的教室，整齐的课桌椅，青春洋溢的学生，多么刻板印象的校园生活喵。
t_en: A spacious classroom, neat desks and chairs, youthful and energetic students. What a stereotypical impression of campus life, meow.

t_ch: 我还是要再次声明，这里发生的一切都是「妄想」，与现实世界无关哦。
t_en: I must reiterate that everything that happens here are just delusions and has nothing to do with the real world, got it?

t_ch: 至于剧场里的演员组合，全凭你自己选择喵。
t_en: As for the cast in the theater, it's all up to you to choose, meow.

t_ch: 你们俩答卷是一样的。
t_en: Both of your answer sheets are the same.

t_ch: 什么科目的试卷？
t_en: For which subject?

t_ch: 历史的试卷。
t_en: For the history test.

t_ch: 历史总是惊人的相似。
t_en: History always repeats itself.

t_ch: 这问题有什么不懂的吗？
t_en: Do you have anything you don't understand about this question?

t_ch: 老师，三月还不太懂。
t_en: Teacher, March still doesn't get it.

t_ch: 胡说，这问题咱懂的。
t_en: Nonsense, I understand this question.

t_ch: 那小三月来讲讲吧。
t_en: Well then, let's hear it from March.

t_ch: 问题懂了，答案没懂。
t_en: I understand the question, not the answer.

t_ch: 老师，有什么建议吗？
t_en: Teacher, do you have any suggestions?

t_ch: 请老师不要提大地兽。
t_en: Teacher, please don't talk about dromases.

t_ch: …你能信任的只有炼金术。
t_en: ...You can only trust in alchemy.

t_ch: 是说炼金术很实用吗？
t_en: Does that mean alchemy is very practical?

t_ch: 亲人会背叛，战友会背叛…
t_en: You know that family will betray you. You know comrades will betray you...

t_ch: 炼金术不会？
t_en: You mean to say, alchemy won't?

t_ch: 炼金术不会就是不会。
t_en: Alchemy is but a tool, you either know it or you don't.

t_ch: 刚才的剑招记住了吗？
t_en: Do you remember the sword moves just now?

t_ch: 我都记住了！
t_en: I remember them all!

t_ch: 彦卿都忘记了。
t_en: I've forgotten them.

t_ch: 云璃，你也要忘记！
t_en: Yunli, you need to forget them too!

t_ch: 为、为什么呢？
t_en: Wh—Why?

t_ch: 忘记其形，神乎其技。
t_en: Forget the form, for divine skill to find its way.

t_ch: 刚才我好像教错了。
t_en: I think I taught them wrongly just now.

t_ch: 欢迎来到妄想剧场，这里没有什么是必须做的，随便逛随便看。
t_en: Welcome to the Delusional Theater! There's nothing you have to do here. Just kick back, wander around, and take it all in.

t_ch: 对了，那边的「演员」是可以手动更换的，遇到有趣的表演，记得及时抓拍喵。
t_en: Oh, and you can manually swap out the "actors" over there. When you spot an interesting performance, make sure to capture it in time, meow!

t_ch: 如果逛得差不多了，随时可以退出，也欢迎再回来玩喵。
t_en: If you're done browsing, feel free to leave anytime. You're always welcome back, meow!

t_ch: 改造间入口
t_en: Modification Room Entrance

t_ch: 哎，这真行得通吗…要不算了吧……
t_en: Ugh, is this really gonna work...? Maybe we should just forget it...

t_ch: 啊！对不起，我是不是挡到您了？抱歉抱歉，我马上——慢着，我认识你！
t_en: Ah! Sorry, am I in your way? My bad, my bad, I'll move right. Wait, I know you!

t_ch: 你是那个拳打绝灭大君、生吃末日兽、长着三头六臂的球棒浣熊！帮帮我！球棒浣熊大人！
t_en: You're the Baseball Raccoon who punched out a Lord Ravager, ate a Doomsday Beast alive, and has three heads and six arms! Help me! Great Baseball Raccoon!

t_ch: 谣言越来越夸张了。
t_en: The rumors are getting more and more ridiculous.

t_ch: 有什么事快说吧。
t_en: What's your story then?

t_ch: 我一直想找个更有趣的工作，但…你也能看出来，我一没胆魄，二没实力，实在想不出还能做什么。
t_en: I've always wanted to find something more interesting to do, but... well, you can see for yourself. I lack the guts and the skills. Can't really think of what else I could do.

t_ch: 所以，朋友建议我换个新形象，重新做机。但我一时半会儿也想不到该怎么办。
t_en: So, my friends suggested I get a makeover and reboot my whole persona. But I don't know what to actually.

t_ch: 拿更强的装备武装自己！
t_en: Gear up with stronger equipment!

t_ch: 我明白了！就把我这无能的躯体，改造成真正的战斗机器吧。
t_en: I understand! I'll remake this pathetic body of mine into a true combat machine.

t_ch: 等我的好消息！
t_en: Just wait for my good news!

t_ch: 让自己成为有用的机铠。
t_en: Make yourself a useful mechatron.

t_ch: 原来如此，生命的真谛，就是让大家的生活变得更美好——我知道该怎么改装自己了。
t_en: I see now... the true meaning of life is to make everyone's lives better. I know exactly how to modify myself now.

t_ch: 谢谢你的建议！
t_en: Thanks for your suggestion!

t_ch: 换个颜色，换种气质。
t_en: New color, new vibe.

t_ch: 真、真的吗？只要改变颜色，就能焕然一新？
t_en: R—Really? Just change the color, and I look brand-new?

t_ch: 那我…我出发了！
t_en: Then I... I'm setting off!

t_ch: 改造间出口
t_en: Modification Room Exit

t_ch: 你来啦，在改造的时候，我和机枪先生好好聊了一下，它的霸念已深深地打动了我。
t_en: You're here! While working on the modifications, Mr. Machine Gun and I had a great chat. Its unyielding conviction has truly moved me.

t_ch: 在我面前，就算是曾经如日中天的共愿帮，也不过一群土鸡瓦犬。什么治安局、执行官，天下都已是我的囊中之物！
t_en: Before me, even the once mighty Synwish Syndicate is nothing but a bunch of clowns. The Security Bureau, the CEOs... the whole world is already in the palm of my hand!

t_ch: 再见了，朋友，我要去成立一番大事业，祝我好运吧！
t_en: See ya, friend! I'm off to build something marvelous! Wish me luck!

t_ch: 不久之后，治安局逮捕了一名当街抢劫噗噜的机铠，缴获赃物乐园纪念币2枚、棒棒糖一颗。
t_en: Shortly after, the Security Bureau arrested a mechatron for mugging a ploo on the street. Seized evidence: 2 Arcadian Tokens and one lollipop.

t_ch: 您好，很高兴再见到您，我现在十分想报答您的恩情，让新手臂发挥它应有的作用。
t_en: Hello! It's great to see you again. I'm really eager to repay your kindness and put this new arm to good use.

t_ch: 您家里需要疏通下水管道吗？最近有没有装修和翻新的需求？
t_en: Does your home need sewer cleaning services? Been thinking about doing any renovations or remodeling lately?

t_ch: 很抱歉，没有。
t_en: Sorry, nope.

t_ch: 我们有帕姆了。
t_en: We've got Pom-Pom.

t_ch: 你怎么突然变了个人似的。
t_en: Why are you acting like a totally different person all of a sudden?

t_ch: 因为愿力，我的朋友，有一股灼热的愿力在我的体内熊熊燃烧。
t_en: Because of Wishpower, my friend. A blazing Wishpower is burning within me.

t_ch: 没关系，一定还有很多人需要我的帮助，我这就去为二相乐园的群众服务！
t_en: No worries, I'm sure there are plenty of people who need my help! I'm off to serve the citizens of Planarcadia!

t_ch: 后来，二相乐园出现了一位牙医，它所开创的电钻拔牙技术，深刻改变了乐园的牙科领域。
t_en: Later, a dentist appeared in Planarcadia, whose pioneering power drill extraction technique revolutionized the arcadia's entire dental field.

t_ch: 你认出眼前的机铠，正是听从了你的建议，将头发染成大人模样的那位。不得不说，它现在真的很酷，很酷……
t_en: You recognize the mechatron before you. It's the one that took your advice and dyed its hair to look like a grown-up. You gotta admit, it looks really cool now. Like, really cool...

t_ch: 它欲言又止，恍惚间，心理活动已写满一整页的硬汉小说。
t_en: It hesitates, words caught in its throat, and in that fleeting moment, its inner monologue could fill an entire page of a tough guy novel.

t_ch: 它默默地看着你，一言不发。
t_en: It stares at you in silence, without saying a word.

t_ch: 很酷的人，是从不说再见的。
t_en: Cool people never say goodbye.

t_ch: 透明办公室
t_en: Transparent Office

t_ch: 透过玻璃墙，你的目光不自觉地被尽头那巨大的头颅吸引。
t_en: Through the glass wall, your gaze is drawn, almost instinctively, to the massive head at the far end.

t_ch: 你非常清楚，二相乐园不存在这么大的机铠。你的好奇心不由地被它吸引，可隔着玻璃，任何声音都变得窸窣。
t_en: You know for a fact that Planarcadia doesn't have mechatrons this massive. Your curiosity is drawn to it, but through the glass, every sound becomes a muffled whisper.

t_ch: 于是，你决定发动——
t_en: And so, you decide to unleash—

t_ch: 我的超级听力。
t_en: My super hearing.

t_ch: 「██<unbreak>0093</unbreak>█████████」，一丝机械、不含任何感情的声音渗过墙壁。
t_en: "██<unbreak>0093</unbreak>█████████," a mechanical, emotionless voice seeps through the wall.

t_ch: 我的超级视力。
t_en: My super vision.

t_ch: 「██<unbreak>0093</unbreak>█████████」，在它摄像头的余光中，你瞥到一串转瞬即逝的数据。
t_en: "██<unbreak>0093</unbreak>█████████," in the corner of its camera's field of view, you catch a glimpse of a fleeting string of data.

t_ch: 我的超级念力。
t_en: My super psychic powers.

t_ch: 「██<unbreak>0093</unbreak>█████████」，恍惚间，你似乎与它的机魂达成了共鸣，支离破碎的信息钻入你的脑海。
t_en: "██<unbreak>0093</unbreak>█████████," in a daze, you seem to resonate with its machine spirit, and fragmented information drills into your mind.

t_ch: 虽然，这个办公室透明公开，完全不像有秘密的样子。但此刻，你的超级推理非常确信，这一定是藏木于林的诡计。
t_en: Sure, the office is transparent and wide open, totally not the kind of place you'd hide secrets. But right now, your super logic is convinced that this is a trick hiding in plain sight.

t_ch: 你在不经意间，涉足了某个不为人知的研究，找到一串能开启装满了邪恶档案的保险柜的密码。
t_en: Before you knew it, you stepped into some unknown research and found the passcode to a vault crammed full of shady files.

t_ch: 我今天必查个水落石出。
t_en: I'm getting to the bottom of this today, no matter what.

t_ch: 你继续放大自己的超级感官，誓要揪出公司在二相乐园的把柄。
t_en: You expand your super-senses even further, determined to dig up dirt on the IPC in Planarcadia.

t_ch: 「工█<unbreak>0093</unbreak>监测███████」
t_en: "Employe█<unbreak>0093</unbreak> Sle█p███████"

t_ch: 认真去听。
t_en: Listen carefully.

t_ch: 不愧是银河球棒侠，你的正义之心战胜了懒惰。而那头颅口中的呢喃，也终于变得清晰。
t_en: As expected of the Galactic Baseballer, your sense of justice has triumphed over laziness. And the murmurs from within that head have finally become clear.

t_ch: 「工号<unbreak>0093</unbreak>，监测到你已陷入睡眠，如在第3次警告后仍未回归工作模式，将记作早退，扣除本月绩效。」
t_en: "Employee ID <unbreak>0093</unbreak>, sleep mode detected. If you fail to return to work mode after the third warning, this will be logged as an early departure, and your monthly performance bonus will be deducted."

t_ch: 那是来自监控摄像头的，冰冷刺骨的咒语。
t_en: It was a cold, bone-chilling curse, delivered straight from the surveillance cameras.

t_ch: 算了吧。
t_en: Forget it.

t_ch: 可惜，你的好奇心仍止步于此。从此与乐园最深邃黑暗的故事（也许并不）失之交臂。
t_en: Unfortunately, your curiosity ends here. From this moment on, you've (maybe not) missed your chance at uncovering the darkest, most profound story of the arcadia.

t_ch: 别胡闹了。
t_en: Quit fooling around.

t_ch: 说不定，那就只是个超大型摄像头呢？
t_en: Maybe it's just a giant camera?

t_ch: 办公室尽头的巨大人形监控装置，实时监测着员工的生命体征与注意力集中度，让人怀疑到底谁才是机器。
t_en: At the far end of the office looms a massive humanoid monitoring system, tracking employees' vital signs and focus levels in real time, making you wonder who the real machines are here.

t_ch: 透明的办公室里，员工们正在忙碌地工作，一举一动，都在游客的眼中。这大概也是一种「全透明化管理」吧。
t_en: Inside the transparent office, employees bustle about their work, every move on full display for passing tourists. Talk about "totally transparent management."

t_ch: 全自动AI管家，全天无死角监控，营造更好的工作环境，为员工带来家一般的温暖。
t_en: A fully automated AI butler with no blind spots <unbreak>24</unbreak>/7, creating a better work environment and bringing employees the warmth of home.

t_ch: 萨姆（战损版）
t_en: SAM (Battle-Worn)

t_ch: 各位请看，这便是我司最新出品的星核猎手萨姆雕像，按照高清录像一比一还原，保证比萨姆本人还邪恶一百倍。
t_en: Ladies and gentlemen, feast your eyes on our company's latest masterpiece: the Stellaron Hunter's SAM statue! Faithfully recreated at 1:1 scale from HD footage, it's guaranteed to be a hundred times more sinister than SAM themself.

t_ch: 那很邪恶了——不过，为什么是战损涂装的？
t_en: Okay, cool... but why does it have a battle-worn finish?

t_ch: 当然是因为，星核猎手在战略投资部正义的铁拳面前，永远都是被打得落花流水的那方。
t_en: Obviously, it's because the Stellaron Hunters stand no chance against the crushing might of the Strategic Investment Department's righteous iron fist.

t_ch: 通缉犯的模型你们也卖？
t_en: You guys sell wanted criminal models too?

t_ch: 在上季度的新品投票中，我们发现，星核猎手在寰宇间有着不菲的人气。
t_en: In last quarter's new product poll, we found that the Stellaron Hunters enjoy quite the popularity across the cosmos.

t_ch: 既然市场呼声如此，我们当然要「存护」消费者的集体诉求。
t_en: Given such vocal demand from the market, we naturally have to "preserve" the collective will of our consumers.

t_ch: 怎么还夹带私货的？
t_en: Why did you include your opinion in the explanation?

t_ch: 我以人格担保，方才的讲解完全参照星际和平网络新闻资料库，绝无半点虚构。
t_en: I swear on my own name that my entire explanation is drawn directly from the Interastral Peace Network news archives. Not a single word of fiction in there.

t_ch: 你大概能想象，在公司的战报中，他们是怎么一次次挫败星核猎手的邪恶阴谋的。
t_en: You can well imagine how the IPC's reports spin it: time and again, they heroically thwart the Stellaron Hunters' sinister schemes.

t_ch: 这侵犯肖像权了吧？
t_en: Isn't that a violation of their right of publicity?

t_ch: 这位客人，你的指控中有两个错误。首先，这位萨姆并非现实中的萨姆，而是《破晓战队VS萨姆》中的登场角色。
t_en: To clarify, there are two points to address. Firstly, this is not a depiction of the actual Stellaron Hunter, but a fictional character from Daybreak Squadron vs. SAM.

t_ch: 其次，倘若萨姆先生认为我司产品涉嫌侵犯其肖像权，他完全可以亲自出庭，在庇尔波因特的法院向我们发起诉讼。
t_en: Secondly, if the individual in question takes issue with the alleged infringement, they are perfectly at liberty to lodge a complaint against us in the halls of Pier Point's judiciary, in person, of course.

t_ch: 送上来让你们抓？
t_en: For your people to arrest them?

t_ch: 我只是作为一位合法公民，给出了应有的建议。不愿意，那就是萨姆先生的问题了。
t_en: I'm simply doing my civic duty by offering some sound advice. Should SAM decline to act on it, the matter rests with them.

t_ch: 好流氓的套路。
t_en: What a despicable tactic.

t_ch: 非常感谢你的夸奖，我们会继续保持的。
t_en: We aim to please. Your recognition fuels our dedication.

t_ch: 我作为亲友可以替她告你！
t_en: As their friend, I can sue you on her behalf!

t_ch: 很抱歉，按照星际和平公司的法律，肖像权纠纷需要本人亲自发起才能受理。
t_en: My apologies, but according to IPC regulations, the right of publicity disputes can only be filed by the individual in question personally.

t_ch: 至于这台机甲，我们已聘请了著名原型师「觉布•跳票」制作等比例模型玩具，现已进入预售阶段。
t_en: As for this mech, we've commissioned the renowned prototype artist, Naemhor Postpone, to produce a scale model collectible. It is now available for pre-order.

t_ch: 现在订购，在下个琥珀纪前就能拿到了。
t_en: Order now, and you'll have it before the next Amber Era.

t_ch: 浑身烧焦的格拉默铁骑…这是你不曾见过，又或者遗忘了的，她的某一刻吗？
t_en: A charred Glamoth's Iron Cavalry... Is this a facet of her you never saw, or perhaps one you've forgotten?

t_ch: 据统计，在星际机甲爱好者的集体论坛中，每3个系统时，就会有2人因战损和原装模型谁更帅而引发一场网络战争。
t_en: Statistics show that across interstellar mech fan communities, a flame war breaks out about every 3 system hours, ignited by a pair of enthusiasts debating whether the battle-worn or stock models look cooler.

t_ch: 不得不承认，把敌人做成模型，非常符合公司的做派。只要有钱可赚，他们能把路易斯•弗莱明都做成盲盒公仔。
t_en: Gotta admit, turning enemies into collectible figures is totally on-brand for the IPC. Were there profit in it, even Louis Fleming would be packaged into blind box plushies.

t_ch: 合影雕塑
t_en: Group Photo Sculpture

t_ch: 古早的海报，宣扬着机铠与人类的和谐共处，以消除居民对这一新兴种族的恐惧。
t_en: A vintage poster promoting harmony between mechatrons and humans, meant to ease residents' fears about this emergent species.

t_ch: 时至今日，机铠已成为乐园生活不可或缺的一份子，游客们争先恐后地体验着「人机一体」，旧时海报的含义，也早已被淡忘。
t_en: In arcadia today, mechatrons have become an indispensable part of life. As visitors flock to embody the vision of "man and mechatron in perfect harmony," the original meaning behind those old posters has long since faded into obscurity.

t_ch: 以破晓战士为首批示范，无自我意识的可着装机铠已进入开发阶段，预计将对老年人、残障群体生活带来较大提升。
t_en: With the Daybreak Warrior as the leading model, development is now underway on non-autonomous wearable mechatrons, which are projected to substantially improve the quality of life for elderly and disabled people.

t_ch: 但也有不少人担心，该技术的滥用，将导致人与幻造种的界线进一步模糊。
t_en: But a lot of people are worried that the abuse of this technology will blur the line between humans and imagenae even further.

t_ch: 从「不要怕，机铠都是我们的好朋友」到「爸爸爸爸，长大了，我也要做大机器人的驾驶员。」
t_en: From "Don't be scared, mechatrons are all our friends" to "Dad, I'm going to pilot a giant robot when I grow up."

t_ch: 充分说明了，什么叫——质疑机铠、理解机铠、成为机铠。总有一天，每个人都会控大机器人的。
t_en: This transformation is a perfect example of what they call: question the mechatron, understand the mechatron, become the mechatron. One day, everyone's gonna pilot giant robots.

t_ch: 魔动机铠•破晓战士
t_en: MagiMech: Daybreak Warriors

t_ch: 时至今日，二相乐园的愿力已无法供给这样的巨人行走，赋予它智慧。
t_en: To this day, Planarcadia's Wishpower can no longer keep such a giant moving, let alone grant it intelligence.

t_ch: 这并非是量的问题，而是更本质的——人们不愿再相信，他们能创造出一个远比自己还宏大的个体。
t_en: It's not a matter of scale, but something more fundamental: people have ceased to believe they can create something far greater than themselves.

t_ch: 冰冷的金属伫立在此处，看不见未来，只能冰冷地凝望着现在。
t_en: This cold metal stands here, blind to the future, staring down the moment with indifference.

t_ch: 但若你不曾忘记抬头仰望星空，总有一天，就连更庞大的存在，也会因你的选择而迈出脚步吧。
t_en: But if you never forget to lift your eyes to the cosmos, then a day will come when even grander beings take their steps forward in answer to the choices you make.

t_ch: 哪怕仍是死物，来到此处的人依然会被眼前的庞然大物震撼，进而感知到个体的渺小。
t_en: Even devoid of life, this leviathan leaves visitors awestruck, making them acutely aware of just how small they truly are.

t_ch: 他们往往会遗忘，创造它们的，也是这些渺小的人类。早在数万年前，筑城者就已制造过，比这更庞大的造物。
t_en: People forget that these colossal titans were first shaped by such small hands. These were the same hands of the Architects, who millennia ago had already built creations far beyond this.

t_ch: 想要飞得更远、跑得更快、跳得更高，于是制造出四肢的延伸，爬上山顶，飞入云间，最终置身于群星之中。
t_en: Driven by the urges to fly farther, run faster, and leap higher, humanity forged extensions of its own form, then conquered peaks, soared into the clouds, and ultimately carried its will into the stars.

t_ch: 如是这样思考，人类文明，就是他们所崇拜的巨人本身。
t_en: Seen in this light, the giant they revere is none other than human civilization itself.

t_ch: 电钻模特
t_en: Drill Model

t_ch: Ω型泛用电钻，多位顶尖设计师联合打造，完美符合机体工学曲线，灵活适应工地作业、建筑维修、日常家居等多种情境，您！值得拥有！
t_en: The All-Purpose Omega-Type Drill, a masterpiece from our top designers! Ergonomically contoured for perfect handling, it's engineered for construction sites, building maintenance, home repairs, and beyond. Go ahead, you've earned it!

t_ch: 警告：禁止在机铠模特工作时，对其进行捉弄、涂鸦、辱骂等攻击性行为，我司将依照《灵物保护法》，依法保护员工尊严与权益。
t_en: Warning: Harassing, vandalizing, or verbally abusing mechatron models during their operational hours is strictly prohibited. We will protect the dignity and legal rights of all employees in accordance with the Faekind Protection Act.

t_ch: 珠星大厦最著名的机铠模特之一，得益于他手中巨大的刺针型钻头，小朋友们都亲切地叫它——「大马蜂」。
t_en: This is one of Pearluxe Tower's most famous mechatron models. The huge needle-shaped drill it carries has earned it a cool nickname among kids: "The Hornet."

t_ch: 电池模特
t_en: Battery Model

t_ch: 沉重的机铠躯体，驱动它的，正是封装了「纯净能源与高浓度愿宝」的第三代愿力转化电池，俗称「能愿宝」。
t_en: This hefty mechatron is powered by a third-generation Wishpower Conversion Battery, a unit that encapsulates "Pure Energy and High-Density Wishbae," commonly called the "Wishbaenk."

t_ch: 经典的奥克斯型机铠，其原型机因在《形变钢筋》中饰演主角奥克斯一角，成为了闻名二相乐园的电影巨星。
t_en: A classic Ox-series mechatron. Its prototype rose to fame as a movie star across Planarcadia for playing the lead role of Ox in Transrebars.

t_ch: 珠星大厦最著名的机铠模特之一，因其极为健硕的身躯，粉丝们为它取了一个贴切的绰号——「超级铁牛」。
t_en: This is one of Pearluxe Tower's most famous mechatron models. Noted for its incredibly brawny build, fans aptly nicknamed it the "Super Iron Bull."

t_ch: 机翼模特
t_en: Wing Model

t_ch: 宇宙空间中，再渺小的推进器也能发挥难以想象的作用。可惜，没有一台机铠能够逃离乐园的引力圈，翅膀再漂亮，也只是装饰而已。
t_en: In the vastness of space, even the tiniest thruster can work wonders beyond imagination. Yet, not a single mechatron can break free from the arcadia's gravitational pull. Their wings, however splendid, are nothing more than extraneous decorations.

t_ch: 第九代推进器（红色限定款），三倍速贴地飞行，安全有保障，以后再也不用挤早高峰了。
t_en: The 9th Generation Thruster (Limited Red Edition) delivers triple-speed, low-altitude ground flight with assured safety. Say goodbye to rush hour traffic jams forever!

t_ch: 珠星大厦最著名的机铠模特之一，赤红的色彩与鬼魅的身影为它换来强而有力的别称——「红蝙蝠」。
t_en: This is one of Pearluxe Tower's most famous mechatron models. Its crimson finish and ghostly silhouette have earned it a striking nickname: the "Red Bat."

t_ch: 机枪模特
t_en: Machine Gun Model

t_ch: 曾有位治安官，在使用机枪和朋友打闹时，忘了将模式从镇压切换回水枪模式。后来，珠星财团就推出了这款打水仗专用款。
t_en: Thanks to a security officer who once forgot to switch their machine gun from suppression back to water gun mode while horsing around with friends, Pearluxe Corp was inspired to create this Water Fight Special Edition.

t_ch: 每台机铠在诞生后，都要花上相当长的时间，才能付清与公司签订的「诞生贷款」，这或许能解释，为何处处都能看到机铠打工人的身影。
t_en: A significant period following a mechatron's assembly is dedicated to servicing the "Birth Loan" signed with the IPC. This debt cycle perhaps accounts for the pervasive presence of mechatron workers in the general labor force.

t_ch: 珠星大厦最著名的机铠模特之一，由于在摆造型时耍帅，不得不僵持在这个相当累人（机）的姿势，发出嘎吱的摩擦声，故而得名——「累地嘎嘎」。
t_en: This is one of Pearluxe Tower's most famous mechatron models. After an attempt to strike an overly cool pose, it is now stuck in a physically (and mechanically) punishing position. The constant, agonizing creaks emanating from its frame earned it a fitting stage name: Rustin' Tinkerlate.

t_ch: 机铠模型
t_en: Mechatron Model

t_ch: 等比例还原的玩具模型，注入微量的愿力后，甚至能够进行小规模的移动。但在看见亲戚家小孩后，会立刻因恐惧陷入僵直状态。
t_en: This meticulously scaled model toy is even capable of limited motion when infused with trace amounts of Wishpower. However, it will immediately freeze up in terror upon spotting a relative's kid.

t_ch: 据说，阿哈喜爱在人们拼装模型的时候使用祂的神力，制造出上色手抖、零件失踪、关节断裂、说明书错误等一系列混沌问题。
t_en: Legend has it that Aha delights in using THEIR divine power to wreak havoc when people are assembling models, causing smudged paint from shaking hands, vanished parts, snapped joints, misprinted manuals, and a whole host of other chaotic catastrophes.

t_ch: 响应时下风靡乐园的英雄热潮，变身机甲巨人的破晓战队，几乎占据了货架的各个角落。
t_en: Riding the wave of the superhero craze sweeping through Arcadia, the Daybreak Squadron has stormed onto shelves to capture nearly every inch of space with its giant transformation mech form.

t_ch: 形变钢筋
t_en: Transrebars

t_ch: 各位《形变钢筋》的粉丝，你们没有看错，站在台上的正是两位电影主角——的替身演员，请为它们献上热烈的掌声！
t_en: Calling all Transrebars fans! Your eyes aren't playing tricks! Taking the stage are the two film lead actors'... stunt doubles! Put your hands together for them!

t_ch: 曾掀起一代机甲热的电影作品，由于星际和平娱乐的竭泽而渔，主角奥克斯已经在数个平行宇宙里数次死亡并数次复活。
t_en: A film that sparked a mech craze for an entire generation. Yet, with Interastral Peace Entertainment milking the franchise dry, the protagonist Oks has died and been resurrected multiple times across countless parallel worlds.

t_ch: 每位银河战力党玩家都应该去看一遍《形变钢筋》，因为它有世上最简洁的战力体系——大就是强。
t_en: Every member of the Cosmicon Collective should check out Transrebars at least once, because it has the most straightforward power system in the universe: bigger is stronger.

t_ch: 工艺展览架
t_en: Craft Display Shelf

t_ch: 冷知识：协助制造机铠的组装员中，有<unbreak>98%</unbreak>的员工，自己也是机铠。你很难想象它们在工作时的场景。
t_en: Fun fact: <unbreak>98%</unbreak> of the workforce assembling mechatrons are themselves mechatrons. It's pretty hard to imagine what the workshop floor must look like.

t_ch: 直到这一步为止，机铠的制造都更接近于玩具，而非机械。至于如何批量地为玩具赋予「灵魂」，那就是商业机密了。
t_en: Up to this point, mechatron manufacturing veers closer to toy-making than anything mechanical. As for how to inject an entire line with "souls," well, that's a trade secret.

t_ch: 当这些塑料零件被注入愿力，成为生命的刹那，将在瞬间获得堪比金属的性能。有人曾想出了一个致富秘诀，但后来他就不想了。
t_en: The moment these plastic components are infused with Wishpower and come to life, they instantly gain performance rivaling metal. A curious mind once glimpsed a fortune in this, and just as swiftly, ceased such thoughts.

t_ch: 合金帕姆王
t_en: Alloy King Pom-Pom

t_ch: 列车已经有一个帕姆了，用不着买第二个。可如果我说，能买一个回去替帕姆分担家务，是不是就心动了？
t_en: The Express already has one Pom-Pom, so there's no need to get a second one. But what if I told you that you could buy one to help Pom-Pom with the chores? Now you're interested, aren't you?

t_ch: 看着它滑稽而重复的舞蹈，你不由地遐想，帕姆做出相同动作的样子。
t_en: Watching its goofy, looping dance, you can't help but picture about Pom-Pom busting out the exact same steps.

t_ch: 「哪怕是在幻想里，这么对待列车长也太失礼了帕！」
t_en: "Even in a fantasy, that's no way to treat the conductor!"

t_ch: 如果说帕姆打扫后的干净程度是<unbreak>100%</unbreak>，那合金帕姆王打扫后的干净程度，就是<unbreak>112%</unbreak>，至于多出来的那些是从哪儿来的，建议你别问。
t_en: If Pom-Pom's cleaning sets the standard at <unbreak>100%</unbreak>, then the Alloy King Pom-Pom pushes the metric to <unbreak>112%</unbreak>. As for where that extra <unbreak>12%</unbreak> comes from... best not to ask.

t_ch: 帕姆王模型
t_en: King Pom-Pom Model

t_ch: 《苍天航路绒绒号》作者，模糊二维马亲自授权的家务机器人，目前正火热抢购中，豪华版还附赠镭射眼杀菌模块哦。
t_en: The household robot personally authorized by Blurry_QR_Colt, author of Fluffy Across the Blue, is currently flying off the shelves! The deluxe edition even comes with a laser-eye sterilization module.

t_ch: 你还是不明白，到底什么家务需要用上一套完整的重火力装备。
t_en: Seriously, what kind of housework could possibly require a full heavy-artillery loadout?

t_ch: 一千个人心中，就有一千种帕姆，但你确信，无论是哪种帕姆，都不该长这模样。
t_en: There are a thousand Pom-Poms in a thousand people's eyes. Yet you're certain that not a single one of them ought to look anything like this.

t_ch: 金牌推销员
t_en: Star Salesperson

t_ch: 做推销员，最重要的就是热情，哪怕你是一台身高八尺、肩比冰箱的机器人。
t_en: When you're in sales, enthusiasm is everything, even if you're an eight-foot-tall robot with shoulders as wide as a refrigerator.

t_ch: 魁梧的身体里，居住着一个青春洋溢的少女灵魂。
t_en: Inside that hulking frame lives the soul of a spirited young girl.

t_ch: 「这些机铠好可怜啊，刚出生就得给公司打工。」；「我好羡慕这些机铠啊，一出生就能找到工作。」
t_en: "These poor mechatrons... Fresh off the assembly line and already working for the IPC." "Man, I'm so jealous of these mechatrons. They come out of the factory with a job already lined up."

t_ch: 基础型机铠
t_en: Basic Model Mechatron

t_ch: 两台正在努力锻炼的机铠，希冀能像同僚们那般，拥有健硕的身体。但它们不知道，赋予机铠强壮的并非肌肉，而是愿宝买来的新身体。
t_en: Two mechatrons pump iron furiously, dreaming of getting as buff as their peers. Little do they know, a mechatron's strength comes not from muscle, but from the shiny new chassis bought with Wishbae.

t_ch: 羸弱的人类站在羸弱的金属后，入神地模仿它们的一举一动，他的每一个细胞都在呐喊着无数肉体凡胎的梦想，「机械飞升！」
t_en: A frail human stands behind the frail metal, mesmerized as they mimic its every move. Every cell in their body cries out the dream of countless mortal beings: "Mechanical Ascension!"

t_ch: 看呐，在遥远的珠星大厦，有两只幼年机铠。哦～它们正在和人类学习狩猎的本领，可千万别打扰到它们。
t_en: Look, over there at the distant Pearluxe Tower, two baby mechatrons! Aww, they're learning the art of the hunt from humans. Shh! Let's not startle them.

t_ch: 速度型机铠
t_en: Speed-Type Mechatron

t_ch: 在汲取了一旁同事健身不练腿的教训后，该机铠励精图治，终于练出了四条精壮有力的大腿。不过，似乎有更重要的事物被遗忘了。
t_en: After learning from a colleague's mishap of not doing leg day at the gym, this mechatron doubled down on its training regimen and finally forged itself four powerful, muscular thighs. However, it seems something more important was forgotten along the way.

t_ch: 真正的强者总是孤芳自赏，正如把装备全叠到速度属性上的它。「帅是一时的，强才是一辈子。」
t_en: A true powerhouse walks a solitary path of glory, much like the one who dumped every last upgrade into speed. "Coolness is fleeting, but being unbreakable is forever."

t_ch: 一切都始于恋人无心的话语，它喜欢四足机甲、喜欢粉色的涂装、喜欢漂亮的翅膀…直到对方离开，才发现自己已变作畸形的模样。
t_en: It all began with the careless words of its lover, for quad mechs, for pink hulls, for graceful wings... Only when its lover left did it realize it had twisted itself into something grotesque.

t_ch: 力量型机铠
t_en: Strength-Type Mechatron

t_ch: 说了多少次，健身一定要练腿！这就是反面教材。
t_en: How many times do I have to say it: never skip leg day! This is what happens when you don't.

t_ch: 机铠改造大赛的人气冠军，充分向同行证明了，别管实用性高不高，帅永远是第一位。
t_en: The crowd favorite of the Mechatron Modification Championship has made one thing perfectly clear to everyone in the business: practical or not, nothing beats looking cool.

t_ch: 据说，它与某位同事有过一场轰轰烈烈的办公室恋情，于是在分手后用钢甲遮住了流泪的面庞，从此再不相见。
t_en: Rumor has it that it once had a passionate office romance with a certain colleague. After the split, it hid its weeping behind a steel mask and swore never to meet again.

t_ch: 成长型机铠
t_en: Growth-Type Mechatron

t_ch: 珠星大厦年度优秀导游，高赞评论：我家孩子说，只有和它说话的时候，不用抬着头。
t_en: Pearluxe Tower's Tour Guide of the Year. Top-rated review: My kid says it's the only one they can talk to without craning their neck.

t_ch: 著名治安官分队「机铠霸王」的队长，负责在合体过程中组成头部，但几乎没人听它说起过从前的故事。
t_en: Leader of the famed security officer squad "Mechatron Overlords," it's responsible for forming the head during combination, but almost no one's ever heard it talk about its past.

t_ch: 在某次战斗中失去了力量，仅剩的头部被移植到狭小的身体上。每当鸟儿在清晨鸣唱，那个残酷的黄昏就会再度浮现眼前。
t_en: Robbed of power in battle, only its head remained, grafted onto a cramped body. Now, every dawn brings the birds' chorus, summoning back that brutal dusk.

t_ch: 机体设置系统
t_en: Chassis Configuration System

t_ch: 还在为自动化幻造缺乏个性化而烦恼吗？还在因你的外形不够出众而深感自卑吗？本界面附带装备自定义功能，你的身体由你决定！
t_en: Tired of mass-produced imagenesis lacking that personal touch? Feeling down because your chassis doesn't quite stand out from the crowd? Well, this interface comes with full equipment customization. Your body, your choice!

t_ch: 不建议任何用户在机体上安装数量超过9个的钻头，无论你有多喜欢钻头。
t_en: It is not recommended for any user to install more than 9 drill bits on the chassis, no matter how much you love drill bits.

t_ch: 请购买新设备的机铠在点单完成后，自觉前往改造室入口排队等候，避免造成拥挤。
t_en: Mechatrons who have purchased new equipment, please proceed to the entrance of the modification room after placing your order and queue up orderly to avoid congestion.

t_ch: 涂装设置系统
t_en: Coating Configuration System

t_ch: 欢迎选购机铠美容套餐，7天内无理由褪色，<unbreak>72</unbreak>款经典涂装任你选择，专属设计师对接，还你一个靓丽机生。
t_en: Welcome to our Mechatron Beauty Package. Enjoy a hassle-free 7-day color change guarantee, select from <unbreak>72</unbreak> classic finishes, work with a dedicated designer, and reclaim the glow-up you deserve.

t_ch: 乐园<unbreak>1999</unbreak>年度配色，真珠白即将售罄，欲购从速。
t_en: Color of the Year of Arcadian Year <unbreak>1999</unbreak>, True Pearl, is selling out fast. Grab yours while you can.

t_ch: 「珠星牌喷漆，我从小喷到大。」
t_en: "Pearluxe Paint, I've been using it since I was a kid."

t_ch: 应广大消费者需求，现已推出「丢人现眼配色警告」功能，在检测到用户选择黄紫、红绿等高危配色时，将需要二次确认。
t_en: By popular demand, the "Fashion Disaster Alert" is now live. Selecting risky combos like yellow-purple or red-green will now require secondary approval before finalizing.

t_ch: 改造室
t_en: Modification Room

t_ch: 经过数次迭代，机铠改造室已升级为覆盖改装、打磨、喷涂、美容美发等一条龙服务的流水线作业。
t_en: After several iterations, the Mechatron Modification Room has leveled up into a full-service assembly line covering everything from refitting and polishing to paint jobs and even grooming services.

t_ch: 改造有风险，医美需谨慎。任何因顾客自定义改造引发的情感、社交、工作问题，公司概不负责。
t_en: Modification and aesthetic procedures involve inherent risks, please proceed with caution. We assume no liability for personal, social, or professional consequences resulting from customer-specified alterations.

t_ch: 过来机的提醒，不要把自己改装成暗恋对象的初恋情机，代餐是吃不饱的。
t_en: A reminder from someone who's been there: Don't go remodeling yourself into your crush's first love. You can't fill one's heart on a substitute.

t_ch: 如此狂拽酷炫的机甲，哪怕是阿基维利和阿哈本尊来了，也一定会为了抢夺它的驾驶权又哭又闹吧。
t_en: Even Akivili and Aha THEMSELVES would probably throw a tantrum fighting over who gets to pilot a mech this ridiculously awesome.

t_ch: 瞧这奢侈的黑金配色，瞧这古典的花纹配饰，简直和星穹列车…不对，公司的版权部门真是越来越猖狂了！
t_en: Look at that premium black-and-gold livery, the intricate classic trim. It's practically a dead ringer for the Astral Express... Hold on. The IPC legal team's audacity is really off the chain now!

t_ch: 放空大脑，让你的意识与机甲同步，对，就这样，慢慢地呼吸，聆听机魂的声音——好吧，这应该是个害羞的机魂。
t_en: Clear your mind, let your consciousness sync with the mech. Yes, just like that. Breathe slowly... and listen to the voice of the soul within the machine... Well, looks like we have a shy machine spirit here.

t_ch: 特技演员
t_en: Stunt Actor

t_ch: 被器材固定的特技演员，永久静止在剧情高潮一幕，宛如时代的眼泪。
t_en: Locked in place by equipment and frozen forever at the scene's climax, the stunt actor stands like a relic of a bygone era.

t_ch: 「今天，就要你好好见识见识，机器人的脚，可不只是装饰而已！」
t_en: "Today, I'll show you that a robot's legs aren't just for show!"

t_ch: 得益于曜青的武术指导设计的动作，与两位演员扎实的基本功，这出惊人的南拳北腿之战足以印刻进每位观众的记忆。
t_en: Thanks to the action choreography designed by the Yaoqing's martial arts director and the solid fundamentals of both actors, this breathtaking clash of southern fists versus northern kicks is sure to be etched into every audience's memory.

t_ch: 城市模型
t_en: City Model

t_ch: 用于还原电影场景的微缩模型，但比起英雄的战斗，游客们似乎更热衷于体验怪兽破坏城市的快感。
t_en: This miniature model is designed for reenacting movie scenes. While it can stage the heroes' battles, visitors seem more into experiencing the thrill of monsters wrecking rampage.

t_ch: 摄影艺术就像一些人的生活，只有对比，才能显示出高大。
t_en: The art of photography is like some people's lives in that it only looks impressive when you have something to compare it to.

t_ch: 多部机器人电影的取景地，每天都会有数不清的游客来到这里，齐声复读经典台词。
t_en: A filming location for multiple robot movies, this site draws daily crowds of tourists who gather to chant iconic lines in unison.

t_ch: 大楼破坏者
t_en: Blockbuster

t_ch: 机铠施工队的绩效冠军，其使用的古法拆迁技巧，已正式列入拆迁作业员培训教程。
t_en: Top performer of the mechatron construction crew, whose time-honored demolition techniques have been officially incorporated into the demolition operator training curriculum.

t_ch: 请值班员工不要在下班后，用大厦模型打枕头大战！至少先确认场馆里还有没有人类。
t_en: Attention staff on duty: No pillow fights using the building models for after hours! At least make sure there aren't any actual human in the venue first.

t_ch: 为了和建筑物一起摆出这个刁钻的姿势，它每天都要花上两个系统时来化妆和准备，所以——记得给好评，亲。
t_en: To strike this tricky pose alongside the building, it spends two whole system hours every day on makeup and prep work. Pretty please, show some love with your review!

t_ch: 伊摩吉铠
t_en: Emoti Armor

t_ch: 与其让旁白说出口，还是你们自己来接吧，我来组成——
t_en: Rather than have the narrator say it, why don't you guys finish it yourselves? I'll form—

t_ch: 只要被伊摩吉遮住脑袋，哪怕是真珠来了，也看不出它有没有偷懒睡觉。它不由地为这天才的想法感到自豪。
t_en: Once an emoti's head is covered, even Pearl herself couldn't tell if it's slacking off or napping. It couldn't help but feel proud of such a stroke of genius.

t_ch: 它骄傲地叉起腰，摆弄出健美的姿态，丝毫不在意旁人的目光。戴上了面具的同时，也摘下了面具。
t_en: Arms akimbo, it flexed into a showy pose, bathing in pride and oblivious to all eyes. In putting on a mask, its true self was freed.

t_ch: 电影《鸭之继承者》的宣传海报，作为系列的最终作，再度使用了十五年前开山之作《哀伤的鸭战士》的经典构图。
t_en: A promotional poster for the movie Heir to the Duck. As the final installment of the series, it once again employs the iconic composition from Sorrowful Duck Warrior, the franchise's groundbreaking first film from fifteen years ago.

t_ch: 矮小的噗噜驾驶着不合常理的巨大机器人，在废墟上同反物质军团交战，数百年过去了，乐园的血脉里，对界外天魔的恐惧也仍未断绝。
t_en: Petite Ploos pilot impossibly colossal mechs, holding the line against the Antimatter Legion in the ruins. Centuries have passed, yet the dread of the Demons From Beyond still runs deep in the veins of arcadia.

t_ch: 与噗噜可爱的形象相反，电影毫不避讳地展现着战争的残酷面，成为了无数小孩的童年阴影。
t_en: In stark contrast to the ploos' adorable image, the movie doesn't hesitate to deliver a raw portrayal of war, searing a childhood nightmare into the minds of a generation.

t_ch: 官方出品的「星穹列车长☆帕姆☆合金玩偶」——做工精良、细节考究，选用优质环保材料，造型高度还原。
t_en: The official "Astral Express Conductor ☆ Pom-Pom ☆ Alloy Doll" features exquisite craftsmanship and meticulous attention to detail. Made with premium eco-friendly materials, its design is highly faithful to the original.

t_ch: 另有多款样式替换套装可供选购，包括：常服、小礼服、厨师服、睡衣、泳装、蓬蓬裙、女仆装…什么？你问后面那些什么时候实装？嗐，别问这么伤感情的问题。
t_en: There are also plenty of alternate outfit sets available for purchase, including: casual wear, dinner jackets, chef uniforms, pajamas, swimsuits, frilly skirts, maid outfits... What? You're asking when the last few will be released? Ah, don't bring up such a sore subject.

t_ch: 虽然但是，比起这种量产的金属塑像，果然还是自家圆滚滚、暖乎乎的列车长撸起来手感更好。
t_en: That said, compared to these mass-produced metal statues, our own chubby, warm and fuzzy conductor is way better to pet.

t_ch: 鉴于官方邀请了模糊二维马老师到场签售，场馆中增设了许多摊位，专门出售《苍天航路绒绒号》典藏版漫画。
t_en: Since the organizers officially invited the legendary Blurry_QR_Colt for a live autograph session, they've set up tons of booths all over the venue selling collector's edition copies of Fluffy Across the Blue.

t_ch: 等等，那是什么——怎么还有你的写真集？！哎呀，这可真是…让人怪不好意思的，诶嘿~
t_en: Wait, what's that? Is that a photo book of you!? Oh my, this is... kinda embarrassing, ehe~

t_ch: 你状似不经意地瞥了眼写真集封面，然后又瞥了一眼，心中不由暗自感慨：天下怎么会有这样的妙人儿！
t_en: You do a casual double-take at the photo book cover, and another. You can't help but wonder: How is there someone this impossibly perfect?

t_ch: 钟表小子，但并不是金碧辉煌的版本。
t_en: Clockie, but not the golden, glitzy version.

t_ch: 比起经典的钟表小子形象，你还是更喜欢「黄金的时刻」广场上那个金灿灿的版本——但那个应该是非卖品，可惜。
t_en: You prefer the glitzy golden version at the Golden Hour Plaza over the classic Clockie look. Shame that one's not for sale, though.

t_ch: 说起来，流梦礁那个钟表小子雕像还挺独特的。如果商品化，也许能打通一条差异化赛道？
t_en: Speaking of which, that Clockie Statue at Dreamflux Reef is pretty unique. If we commercialize it, maybe we can carve out a niche market?

t_ch: 「小青龙」手办白模。手办造型明显是鳞渊境雕像的复刻，你严重怀疑，建模师根本就是在旅游取材时顺手抄了一下。
t_en: Unpainted "Dragon Young" figurine. The figurine's design is clearly a replica of the statue from Scalegorge Waterscape. You strongly suspect the modeler just straight-up copied it while on a research trip there.

t_ch: 不过这尊雕像的模特并不是丹恒。诶，是谁来着？好像是…丹恒的兄弟？（开玩笑的，是龙尊雨别。）
t_en: But the model for that statue isn't Dan Heng. Huh, then who is it? It seems like... Dan Heng's brother? (Just kidding, it's the high elder Yubie.)

t_ch: 无论如何，此物当与丹恒老师共赏。如果把这个当礼物送给他，他的表情一定会很害羞吧。
t_en: At any rate, this treasure is meant to be enjoyed alongside Mr. Dan Heng. Were I to present this to him as a gift, I'm certain he would be quite flustered.

t_ch: 不得不说，这些毛茸茸的小动物看起来就是超级无敌可爱——难怪《绒绒号》漫画能够如此火爆。
t_en: Gotta say, these fluffy little critters are absolutely, ridiculously adorable. No wonder The Fluffy comics are such a huge hit.

t_ch: 不愧是球棒浣熊！你稍微有那么一点自豪——即便是在海报中，也要站C位。
t_en: As expected of the Baseball Raccoon! You can't help but feel a swell of pride seeing it command the spotlight, even on a poster.

t_ch: 海报上的帕姆看起来很小。但这其实是近大远小的原理，它的体型和列车一致。（骗你的。）
t_en: The Pom-Pom on this poster looks tiny, but that's just forced perspective. Pom-Pom is actually the same size as the Express itself. (Just kidding.)

t_ch: 飞驰的列车、斑斓的银河…即使在宇宙时代，对于的大部分人来说，开拓之旅也像个无比新奇的天外之梦。
t_en: A speeding Express, a dazzling cosmos... Even in the cosmic age, the trailblazing expedition still feels to most like an impossibly wondrous dream.

t_ch: 看着眼前的海报，饶是早已经历了无数大风大浪，你依旧有些心潮澎湃。
t_en: Looking at the poster before you, despite all you've seen and done, you still feel your heart stirring with excitement.

t_ch: 你突然发现自己已经无法想象，如果当初没有选择登上列车，余下的人生该是何等无聊寡淡。无论如何，列车都是你永远的家。
t_en: It suddenly hits you that you can't even imagine how dull and empty your life would've been if you hadn't chosen to board the Express that day. No matter what happens, the Express will always be your home.

t_ch: 没人能拒绝列车长的可爱眼神攻击，就连你也不行。
t_en: No one can resist the conductor's adorable puppy-dog eyes, not even you.

t_ch: 「列车长天下第一可爱！反对意见不予接受！」
t_en: "The conductor is the cutest in the entire universe! All objections overruled!"

t_ch: 看着画面中的小可爱，你突然发现：明明下车才没多久，你就已经开始怀念起列车长柔软毛绒的手感了。
t_en: Looking at the cuties in the picture, you suddenly realize: Even though you only just left the Express, you're already missing the feel of the conductor's soft, fluffy fur.

t_ch: 场馆招牌
t_en: Venue Sign

t_ch: 脱线的球棒浣熊，寡言的汪汪丹，活泼可爱的三月兔、知性优雅的姬奇猫、沉稳可靠杨叔…还有无敌可爱的列车长帕姆，共同组成了温馨的列车大家庭！
t_en: Together, the whimsical Baseball Raccoon, the quiet Woof Woof Dan, the bubbly March Bunny, the intelligent and elegant Himekat, the ever-dependable Mr. Yang, and... the utterly adorable conductor Pom-Pom form one big happy Express family!

t_ch: 也许只要列车继续行驶，《绒绒号》就不得不继续更新吧。加油呀！模糊二维马老师！
t_en: Maybe as long as the Express keeps running, The Fluffy will have to keep getting updates too. You got this, Blurry_QR_Colt!

t_ch: 你突然想起车上还有个「闭嘴」，但转念一想，如果加上了这个家伙，《绒绒号》怕不是要变成冷笑话大全。
t_en: You suddenly remember there's still "Shush" on the express, but then again, if that guy were added to the mix, The Fluffy would probably turn into a bad joke anthology.

t_ch: 贝洛伯格「银鬃尉官」兵人模型。
t_en: A figurine of Belobogian Silvermane Lieutenant.

t_ch: 时至今日，你还清晰地记得来自他们的正义群殴，以及那让人很难不产生心理阴影的「盾反」。
t_en: To this day, you still vividly remember their righteous punches and that traumatizing "Shield Reflect"... Truly the stuff of nightmares.

t_ch: 这些持盾哥只是存护命途的战士？不，那简直是克里珀本珀！
t_en: These shield-wielding dudes are just warriors of the Preservation? Nah, they're basically Qlipoth in the flesh!

t_ch: 贝洛伯格「银鬃近卫」兵人模型。
t_en: A figurine of Belobogian Silvermane Soldier.

t_ch: 负责冲锋陷阵近卫战士，造型上没什么辨识度，但销量意外地非常不错。
t_en: The vanguard warrior figurine, while not particularly distinctive in design, has unexpectedly flown off the shelves.

t_ch: 稍微有些遗憾：这个系列竟然没有「贝洛伯格琥珀王」——呃，好吧，你是说「自动机兵•甲虫」 。
t_en: The only slight letdown is that this series doesn't even have a "Belobogian Amber Lord." Uh, well, you mean the "Automaton Beetle."

t_ch: 列车组团扇、盲盒、玩偶、列车模型…总之就是官方出品的基础款。场馆中有很多这样的摊位，但据说总体上还是供不应求。
t_en: You've got all the basic set of official merchandise here: Express Crew fans, blind boxes, plushies, Express model kits... Stalls like this are everywhere at the venue, but word is they still can't keep up with demand.

t_ch: 毛茸茸之活力四射三人组——相较对面两位而言。
t_en: The Fluffy and Energetic Trio... compared to those two, anyway.

t_ch: 毛茸茸之沉稳寡言二人组——相较对面三位而言。
t_en: The Fluffy and Stoic Duo... at least, compared to those three.

t_ch: 帕姆的小火车
t_en: Pom-Pom's Tiny Express

t_ch: 园区接驳车，又名「帕姆的小火车」。名字是帕姆、造型是帕姆、广播音源也是帕姆。他们好爱，真的。
t_en: Park Shuttle, also known as the "Pom-Pom's Tiny Express." Named after Pom-Pom, designed like Pom-Pom, with broadcast announcements voiced by Pom-Pom. They really love Pom-Pom. Like, really.

t_ch: 某种意义上，列车长这下真的与列车合体了。
t_en: In a sense, the conductor has truly become one with the Express now.

t_ch: 据说有不少粉丝的梦想，是被宇宙无敌可爱的「列车长」撞进二次元、转生绒绒号的世界……
t_en: Rumor has it that countless fans dream of being blasted straight into the world of The Fluffy by the universe's most adorable conductor...

t_ch: 「应援棒自取，免费的…」「啊？手办？手办不可以，自己去摊位上买啦！」
t_en: "Help yourself to fan lightsticks, they're free..." "Huh? A figure? No way, you gotta buy those at the booth yourself!"

t_ch: 介于官方邀请了模糊二维马老师到场签售，场馆中增设了许多摊位，专门出售《绒绒号》漫画。
t_en: Since the organizers officially invited the legendary Blurry_QR_Colt for a live autograph session, they've set up tons of booths all over the venue selling The Fluffy comics.

t_ch: 看着这些漫画与写真集的封面，你不由再次感慨：啊，我真是天生丽质难自弃！
t_en: Looking at the covers of these comics and photo books, you can't help but sigh once more: Ah, such natural beauty is impossible to hide!

t_ch: 说起来…既然是仙舟会场，难道不该有些仙舟话本吗？
t_en: Speaking of which... since this is a Xianzhou venue, shouldn't there be some Xianzhou storybooks around?

t_ch: 幻胧胧
t_en: Phanty

t_ch: 这舞台布景有点东西…就连「绝灭大君」都能包装得如此可爱又无害。
t_en: This stage design is sure something else... Even a Lord Ravager gets packaged up to look so cute and harmless.

t_ch: 看到这个「幻胧胧」，你不由对绒绒号中「三月兔血战幻胧胧」的剧情产生了强烈的好奇——模糊老师的瞎编能力到底有多强啊？
t_en: Seeing this Phanty, you can't help but burn with curiosity about the plot of "March Bunny's Bloody Battle with Phanty" in The Fluffy. Just how much yarn can Blurry_QR_Colt spin?

t_ch: 不知为何，你脑中突然响起个既熟悉又陌生的BGM：「幻胧胧呀吱悠悠地转，这里的风景真好看~」
t_en: For some reason, a familiar yet strange BGM suddenly starts playing in your head: "Phanty goes round and round~ Round and round, round and round~"

t_ch: 神君
t_en: Lightning-Lord

t_ch: 虽然要对战的《云五战队》变成了《破晓战队》，但回过头来再看，观众的反响似乎意外地不错？
t_en: Even though the opponent switched from the High-Cloud Squadron to the Daybreak Squadron, looking back now, the audience's reaction seems surprisingly positive, isn't it?

t_ch: 值得庆幸的是，虽然景元变成了景元元，但神君至少还不是神君君……
t_en: On the bright side, while Jing Yuan became Jing Yuanyuan, at least the Lightning-Lord has yet to become Lightning-Lordy...

t_ch: 你暗暗计划：如果有机会，一定要邀请景元来观赏舞台剧《血战鳞渊境！云五战队集结！》
t_en: You decide then and there: If the chance comes up, you absolutely have to invite Jing Yuan to watch the stage play Bloodbath at Scalegorge Waterscape! High-Cloud Squadron Assembles!

t_ch: 仙舟人开的仙舟特色风味小吃摊——别说，味道还挺正宗。
t_en: A Xianzhou food stall run by actual Xianzhou natives. And hey, the flavors are pretty authentic.

t_ch: 你突然有点怀念高阿姨家新鲜出锅的大包子…看来是时候回一趟金人巷了。
t_en: A sudden craving for Tall Auntie's fresh-steamed buns hits you... Looks like it's time for a trip back to Aurum Alley.

t_ch: 你现在想吃： 貘馍卷、鸣藕糕、琼实鸟串、热浮羊奶、仙人快乐茶…可惜这里都没有卖！
t_en: Your stomach has decided: It wants tuskpir wrap, songlotus cake, berrypheasant skewers, steamed puffergoat milk, Immortal's Delight... Too bad none of it's sold here!

t_ch: 正所谓「包子大、饺子小，几个包子就吃饱」——这脸盘大的包子，一般人确实也吃不了几个。虽然真的很好吃就是了。
t_en: As the saying goes: "Buns are large, dumplings are slight. A few good buns will do just right." When the bun's as wide as your face, no wonder most people can only manage a couple. That's the thing, though: They're unbelievably delicious.

t_ch: 《苍天航路绒绒号》官方授权合作书店，绝赞火热贩售中。
t_en: Books are flying off the shelves at the officially licensed Fluffy Across the Blue bookstore!

t_ch: 如我所书
t_en: As I've Written

t_ch: 你翻开面前的《如我所书》，看着里面熟悉的故事，一些自豪、怀旧与悲伤的情绪涌上心头。真怀念啊……
t_en: The pages of As I've Written fall open to stories you know by heart. A tide of pride, nostalgia, and melancholy wells up inside you. Ah, those were the days...

t_ch: 你兴冲冲地翻开面前的《悬锋大辞典》，却遗憾地发现是本手账。不过也有好消息：买手账赠迷迷贴纸。
t_en: You eagerly flip open the Grand Kremnos Dictionary in front of you, only to discover with disappointment that it's actually a journal. Fortunately, the silver lining is that it comes with a free Mem sticker!

t_ch: 鉴于「翁法罗斯区」尚在建中，这个书店或许是目前整个园区里，翁星浓度最高的地方了。
t_en: Given that the Amphoreus Zone is still under construction, this bookshop is probably the most Amphorean spot here.

t_ch: 你又想起「开拓」的承诺：逐火的故事将传唱群星。人们会记得，翁法罗斯是一个辉煌、壮丽的世界。
t_en: You recall the promise of Trailblaze: The story of Flame-Chase will echo across the stars. People will remember that Amphoreus was a brilliant, magnificent world.

t_ch: 你以为是饮料瓶？其实是大引擎哒！
t_en: You thought it was a drink bottle, didn't you? Actually, it's a giant engine!

t_ch: 看到这玩意，你突然想起绒绒号某段剧情：列车组为了唤醒匹诺康尼的其他动物，占领了苏乐达汽水工厂…用苏乐达给列车补充燃料。
t_en: Seeing this thing suddenly reminds you of a certain plot from The Fluffy: To wake up the other animals in Penacony, the Express Crew seized a SoulGlad soda factory... and used SoulGlad to refuel the Express.

t_ch: 虽然严重怀疑虚照收了不少广告费，但考虑到在匹诺康尼，苏乐达确实也可以当做燃料使用，你又释然了。
t_en: You seriously suspect Nihilux pocketed a hefty advertising fee for this, but considering that in Penacony, SoulGlad can indeed be used as fuel, you let it slide.

t_ch: 改良款自助苏乐达机，可惜只有原味。
t_en: An improved self-serve SoulGlad machine, though sadly it only has the original flavor.

t_ch: 神主日大立牌
t_en: The Great Septimus Mega Standee

t_ch: 神主日超大立牌，很酷很还原，并且阐述了一个重要的道理：行车不规范，亲人两行泪。
t_en: The Great Septimus mega standee, super cool and totally accurate! It also teaches people an important lesson: Reckless driving leads to your loved ones in tears.

t_ch: 不知道星期日看到这东西会怎么想…或许有机会可以把人骗过来玩玩？
t_en: Wonder what Sunday would think if he saw this thing... Perhaps he could be tricked into coming over to try it out sometime?

t_ch: 某种意义而言，在这辆「帕姆接驳车」上的你们，又何尝不是一种击破队……
t_en: In a sense, aren't you guys on this Pom-Pom Shuttle a Break team yourselves...

t_ch: 列车立牌
t_en: Express Standee

t_ch: 「愿此行，终抵群星——」
t_en: "May This Journey Lead Us Starward..."

t_ch: 车票气球
t_en: Boarding Pass Balloon

t_ch: 这些气球或许是本场Fes中，于你而言最有诱惑力的东西了。唯一美中不足的是——如果是十连该多好。
t_en: These balloons are probably the most tempting thing at this festival for you. The only thing that's missing is... if only you could do a ten-pull.

t_ch: 此处乃「众神嗤笑之地」，不录于图册、不载于典籍，仅潜匿于某些秘不可宣的旧梦里……
t_en: This is the "Land of Sneering Gods," a place absent from maps, unrecorded in any tome, hidden away only in certain unspeakable dreams of old...

t_ch: 或许你有幸来到了「画中世界」破碎的一角。透过支离的颓垣、扭曲的空间，某些古老的存在，正悄无声息地向你揭开面纱的一角。
t_en: Perhaps you've stumbled upon a fractured corner of the "World in Canvas." Through the shattered ruins and distorted space, certain ancient presences are quietly lifting a corner of their veil before you.
